title: Mapping Spatiotemporal Macrophage Activation in Zebrafish Neuro-inflammation
abstract: This poster outlines a pipeline for tracking microglial and macrophage migrations in transgenic zebrafish larvae during laser-induced localized nervous tissue injuries. We demonstrate automated image thresholding techniques that facilitate the segmentation of cell coordinates over 12-hour video captures.

title: Computational Assessment of Micro-plastic Sedimentation Rates in Freshwater Streams
abstract: We developed a physical fluid modeling simulation in Python to predict how micro-plastic particles of varying shapes settle in slow-moving stream currents. Computational simulations were validated against experimental sand-box water setups, yielding 92% structural similarity in deposition density.
